args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%' OR LOWER(artist) LIKE '%bruce maginnis%'

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
